news.title: Google Returns to Smart Eyewear Market with AI-Powered Glasses in 2026
news.summary: Google announces its return to the smart eyewear market with plans to launch AI-powered smart glasses in 2026, featuring screen-free AI assistance and display-equipped AI glasses.
news.content: Google has announced its return to the connected eyewear sector with plans to launch AI-powered smart glasses in 2026, marking a fresh attempt to crack the wearable technology market following the commercial failure of Google Glass in 2013. The tech giant revealed its ambitious strategy during The Android Show: XR Edition event on 8 December, unveiling a comprehensive approach to extended reality (XR) that includes multiple device categories built on its new Android XR platform.

news.title: Google's New AI Glasses to Feature Gemini Assistants and Holographic Displays
news.summary: Google confirms its new Google AI glasses will feature Gemini assistants and holographic displays, partnering with Warby Parker and Samsung.
news.content: Google has officially set a timeline for its return to the face-worn computing arena, confirming on Monday that the first iteration of its new Google AI glasses will launch in 2026. The announcement signals a concerted effort by the Alphabet-owned company to claw back territory from Meta in the rapidly heating consumer electronics sector, a market Google abandoned nearly a decade ago after the high-profile failure of Google Glass.

news.title: Apple Introduces iPhone 17e with Enhanced AI Features
news.summary: Apple introduces iPhone 17e with A19, C1X modem, a 48MP camera, MagSafe, and satellite features, starting at $599 with 256GB.
news.content: Apple’s iPhone 17e targets value with A19, C1X modem, a 48MP camera, MagSafe, and satellite features, starting at $599 with 256GB. The real story for commenters was size: longing for mini/SE ergonomics and one-handed use.

news.title: Xiaomi's Smart Glasses Strategy: Incremental Innovation and User Education
news.summary: Xiaomi is focusing on incremental innovation and user education with its smart glasses strategy.
news.content: Xiaomi's Smart Glasses Strategy: Incremental Innovation and User Education. Xiaomi is focusing on incremental innovation and user education with its smart glasses strategy, aiming to enhance user convenience and smart home connectivity.

news.title: New Health Tracking Features in Amazfit's Smart Watch
news.summary: Amazfit introduces new health tracking features in its smart watch, including real-time workout stats and health metrics.
news.content: Brands like Amazfit and Meta displayed workout stats in real time, turning glasses into personal trainers. Even Realities G2, announced before CES, now integrates health metrics via the R1 ring.

news.title: AI and AR Capabilities Seamlessly Integrated in New Prototype Android XR Glasses
news.summary: Google reentered the smart glass industry with the release of new prototype Android XR glasses, highlighting AR and AI capabilities.
news.content: Google reentered the smart glass industry with the release of new prototype Android XR glasses. The business highlighted how AR and AI capabilities may be seamlessly integrated.

news.title: Meta Unveils Two New Ray-Ban Prescription Smart Glasses
news.summary: Meta boosts its AI gadget lineup with two new Ray-Ban prescription smart glasses, targeting billions of vision correction users.
news.content: Meta unveils two new Ray-Ban prescription smart glasses, boosting its AI gadget lineup and targeting billions of vision correction users.

news.title: Rokid Demonstrates Glasses Capable of Mobile Payments at CES 2026
news.summary: Rokid showcased glasses capable of mobile payments at CES 2026, indicating a future where wallets become obsolete.
news.content: Rokid demonstrated glasses capable of mobile payments, hinting at a future where wallets become obsolete.

news.title: Zephyr RTOS Joins OpenSSF Best Practices Program
news.summary: The Zephyr RTOS project has joined the Open Source Security Foundation (OpenSSF) Best Practices program to improve security.
news.content: The Zephyr RTOS project, a leading real-time operating system for the internet of things, has joined the Open Source Security Foundation (OpenSSF) Best Practices program. This move aims to further improve the security of the Zephyr project.

news.title: RT-Thread Studio 2.0 Supports More RTOS
news.summary: RT-Thread Studio 2.0 has been released, adding support for more RTOS, including FreeRTOS and NuttX.
news.content: RT-Thread Studio 2.0 has been released, adding support for more RTOS, including FreeRTOS and NuttX, to streamline development workflows.

news.title: 涂鸦智能 Announces New API Updates for AI Platform
news.summary: Tuya Smart, a leading AI+IoT platform, announces new API updates to enhance device connectivity and user experience.
news.content: Tuya Smart, also known as 涂鸦智能, has announced new API updates for its AI platform, aimed at enhancing device connectivity and user experience.

news.title: Baidu's AI Cloud Sees Significant Growth in Q1 2026
news.summary: Baidu reports significant growth in its AI cloud services in Q1 2026, driven by increased demand for AI applications in various sectors.
news.content: Baidu, a major player in the AI space, has reported significant growth in its AI cloud services in Q1 2026. The growth is attributed to the increased demand for AI applications across various sectors.

news.title: Kanaan Technology Launches KANAAN-K1 AI Smart Glasses
news.summary: Kanaan Technology launches the KANAAN-K1 AI smart glasses with voice assistant 'Xiaonan', enhancing smart home connectivity.
news.content: Kanaan Technology launched the KANAAN-K1 AI smart glasses with voice assistant 'Xiaonan' on December 31, 2024, enabling seamless smart home connectivity and functionality via voice commands, enhancing user convenience.

news.title: DreamSmart's AR+AI Smart Glasses Facilitate Seamless Connectivity
news.summary: DreamSmart's AR+AI smart glasses, featuring Flyme AI OS and Flyme Link technology, offer seamless connectivity across devices.
news.content: DreamSmart's AR+AI smart glasses, featuring Flyme AI OS and Flyme Link technology, facilitate seamless connectivity across various devices, offering an uninterrupted intelligent experience.
